member.name: T:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService
member.summary: Expose the functionality related to access user variables.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.Exists(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified uservar exists.
member.returns: true if the specified uservar is exists; otherwise, false.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.Exists(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified uservar exists.
member.param: Full name of the user variable.
member.returns: true if the specified uservar is exists; otherwise, false.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetStringValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the string value based on a collection.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetStringValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the string value.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.TryGetValue(System.String,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the string value of the given user variable collection and name.
member.param: The value of the user variable if it exists.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetDoubleValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the double value based on a collection.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetDoubleValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the double value.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.TryGetValue(System.String,System.String,System.Double@)
member.summary: Tries to get the double value of the given user variable collection and name.
member.param: The value of the user variable if it exists.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetIntValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the int value based on a collection.
member.returns: User variable value. If the user variable doesn't exist, or the value cannot be converted to int, an exception will be thrown.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetIntValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the int value.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.TryGetValue(System.String,System.String,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Tries to get the int value of the given user variable collection and name.
member.param: The value of the user variable if it exists.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetBoolValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the boolean value based on a collection.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetBoolValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the boolean value.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.TryGetValue(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Tries to get the bool value of the given user variable collection and name.
member.param: The value of the user variable if it exists.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetArrayStringValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets userVar value of kind Array of String based on a collection.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetArrayStringValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the array of strings value.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetArrayDoubleValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets userVar value of kind Array of Double.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetArrayDoubleValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the array of double value.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetArrayIntValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets userVar value of kind Array of Integer.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetArrayIntValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the array of Integer value.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetArrayBoolValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets userVar value of kind Array of Boolean.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetArrayBoolValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the array of Boolean value.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetArrayValueAsCommaSeparatedString(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the comma separatated string value of array uservar of any type.
member.returns: Comma separated string of array uservar.
member.remarks: Users responsible for checking existance before calling Get/Set methods.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetType(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the uservar type.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetType(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the uservar type.
member.param: Full name of the user variable.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the value.
member.example:
This is a code example:
Base.ServiceStore<IUserVarService>.Service.SetValue("myCollection", "myUserVar", "newValue").

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the value.
member.example:
This is a code example:
Base.ServiceStore<IUserVarService>.Service.SetValue("myUserVarFullName", "newValue").

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Sets the value.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Sets the value.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the value.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the value.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the value.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the value.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Set userVar value of kind Array of String.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Set userVar value of kind Array of String.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double})
member.summary: Set userVar value of kind Array of Double.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double})
member.summary: Set userVar value of kind Array of Double.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Set userVar value of kind Array of Integer.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Set userVar value of kind Array of Integer.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Set userVar value of kind Array of Boolean.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetValue(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Set userVar value of kind Array of Boolean.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetAllNamesFromCollection(System.String)
member.summary: Gets List of uservars in a given collection.
member.returns: The UserVars names that appear in the collection.
member.exception: Throw FatalException when Global fail to get.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetAllCollections
member.summary: Gets List of all uservar collection names.
member.returns: The uservar collection names in the test program.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetScValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a value to the user variable in SCVars uservar collection.
member.param: user variable name to be get in SCVars collection.
member.example:
This shows how to get value from userVar of SCVars.
string mySCValue = Prime.Services.UserVarService.SetValue("mySCVarName")

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.SetScValue(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets a value to the user variable in SCVars uservar collection.
member.param: user variable name to be set in SCVars collection.
Value to be set for the uservar.
member.example:
This shows how to set the value to an userVar of SCVars.
string mySCValue = Prime.Services.UserVarService.SetValue("mySCVarName", "myNewValue")

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.ExistsInScVarsCollection(System.String)
member.summary: Returns if a given user variable in SCVars uservar collection exists.
member.param: User variable name to check existence of.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.ExistsInMainScVarsCollection(System.String)
member.summary: Returns if a given user variable exists in the _Main_ SCVar collection.
member.param: User variable name to check existence of. Only full name with collection.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.ExistsInSharedScVarsCollection(System.String)
member.summary: Returns if a given user variable exists in the _Shared_ SCVar collection.
member.param: User variable name to check existence of. Only full name with collection.

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.TryGetScValue(System.String)
member.summary: Tries to get value of the user variable in SCVars uservar collection. When given uservar does not exists it returns as default an empty string.
member.param: User variable to get in SCVars collection.
member.returns: User variable value if it exists, else empty string.
member.example:
This shows how to get an userVar of the SCVar collection.
string myValue = Prime.Services.UserVarService.TryGetScValue("mySCVarName")

member.name: M:Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService.GetScIntValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the int value.
member.returns: User variable value. If the user variable doesn't exist, or the value cannot be converted to int, an exception will be thrown.
member.example:
This shows how to get an userVar of the SCVar collection.
int myValue = Prime.Services.UserVarService.TryGetScValue("mySCVarName")

member.name: T:Prime.UserVarService.UserVarService
member.summary: Implementation of UserVarService.
